subcodes.first_line: O thou cherished handmaiden of God! Thy letter was received and its contents were perused with the utmost care [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی نامه شما رسید و مضمون بکمال دقت ملاحظه گردید فی الحقیقه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @consolation and comfort, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation
